moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean make chart history
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' secures its 14th non-consecutive week at #1 on the Official UK Singles Chart, making it the longest-running #1 of the 2020s.

angles.name: Chart Record Breakers
angles.copy: 14 weeks at Number 1! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean have officially made chart history with 'Rein Me In'. The longest-running UK #1 of the 2020s – what a track!

angles.name: Olivia Dean Dominance
angles.copy: Olivia Dean is owning the charts! Not only #1 with Sam Fender, but three more tracks in the Top 5. Talk about a powerhouse summer!

moments.title: The Bear Season 5 drops today!
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated fifth season of the acclaimed drama 'The Bear' premieres today on Disney+ in the UK.

angles.name: New Season Drop
angles.copy: Chef! Yes, Chef! The Bear Season 5 is here. Get ready for more kitchen chaos, intense drama, and possibly a few more 'cousin' moments. Streaming on Disney+ now!

angles.name: Weekend Binge
angles.copy: Your weekend plans just got better. The new season of The Bear is out today! Who's binging all the episodes?

moments.title: Madonna's exclusive interview with Graham Norton
moments.blurb: Madonna sits down for a world exclusive interview with Graham Norton on BBC One tonight, discussing her life and upcoming album 'Confessions II'.

angles.name: Queen of Pop on BBC
angles.copy: The Queen of Pop is in the house! Madonna joins Graham Norton tonight on BBC One for a world exclusive chat ahead of her new album. Expect revelations!

angles.name: Confessions II Preview
angles.copy: Get the inside scoop on Madonna's new album 'Confessions II' tonight as she chats with Graham Norton. Tune in for all the details!

moments.title: Wimbledon Championships begin
moments.blurb: The 139th Wimbledon Championships, the third Grand Slam of the year, commence on Monday, June 29, 2026, at the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Tennis Grand Slam
angles.copy: Get ready for strawberries and cream! Wimbledon 2026 kicks off on Monday, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to London. Who are you backing for the title?

angles.name: Road to Wimbledon
angles.copy: The grass courts are prepped! The world's best tennis players arrive in London this weekend, with the main draw starting Monday. Let the Championships begin!

moments.title: Formula 1 British Grand Prix at Silverstone
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 British Grand Prix takes place at Silverstone from July 2-5, 2026, featuring three days of practice, sprint qualifying, and the main race.

angles.name: F1 Weekend
angles.copy: Start your engines! The British Grand Prix roars into Silverstone next weekend, July 2-5. Who's heading to the home of British motorsport?

angles.name: Silverstone Showdown
angles.copy: Four days of high-octane action await at Silverstone for the British Grand Prix! Get ready for speed, drama, and world-class racing.

moments.title: BST Hyde Park kicks off this weekend
moments.blurb: The annual BST Hyde Park festival begins this weekend, running from June 27 to July 12, with headliners including Lewis Capaldi, Pitbull, and Mumford & Sons.

angles.name: London Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Hyde Park is about to get LOUD! BST Hyde Park starts tomorrow with a stellar line-up including Lewis Capaldi, Pitbull & Mumford & Sons. Who are you seeing?

angles.name: Summer Gigs
angles.copy: Big names, big park! BST Hyde Park brings the summer festival vibes to London starting this weekend. Let us know who you're excited for!

moments.title: State Fayre festival in Chelmsford this weekend
moments.blurb: The new State Fayre festival, dubbed 'the UK's biggest music and BBQ festival', takes place this weekend (June 26-28) at Hylands Park, Chelmsford, featuring Kings of Leon and Alanis Morissette.

angles.name: Festival Alert
angles.copy: New festival alert! State Fayre is happening this weekend in Chelmsford with Kings of Leon and Alanis Morissette. Music and BBQ - sounds like summer perfection!

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: Hylands Park is hosting the inaugural State Fayre festival this weekend! Kings of Leon, Alanis Morissette... who's going?

moments.title: Happy 71st to Mick Jones of The Clash
moments.blurb: Mick Jones, influential guitarist and songwriter for The Clash, celebrates his 71st birthday today.

angles.name: Punk Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 71st Birthday to the legend Mick Jones, guitarist and co-founder of The Clash! What's your favourite Clash track?

moments.title: Happy 70th to Chris Isaak
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Chris Isaak, known for hits like 'Wicked Game', turns 70 today.

angles.name: Wicked Game Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 70th Birthday to the iconic Chris Isaak! Hope he's having a wicked good day!

moments.title: Happy 57th to Radiohead's Colin Greenwood
moments.blurb: Colin Greenwood, bassist for the acclaimed band Radiohead, celebrates his 57th birthday today.

angles.name: Radiohead Bassist
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 57th Birthday to Radiohead's brilliant bassist, Colin Greenwood! What's your go-to Radiohead track?

moments.title: Happy 84th to Bruce Johnston of The Beach Boys
moments.blurb: Bruce Johnston, long-time member of The Beach Boys, turns 84 tomorrow.

angles.name: Beach Boys Legend
angles.copy: Tomorrow, Bruce Johnston of The Beach Boys celebrates his 84th birthday! Send your good vibrations!

moments.title: Mel Brooks turns 100!
moments.blurb: Legendary filmmaker, actor, and songwriter Mel Brooks celebrates his milestone 100th birthday on Sunday.

source.l: Off The Wall School Of Music

angles.name: Comedy & Musical Icon
angles.copy: A true legend turns 100 this Sunday! Happy Birthday to the incredible Mel Brooks, whose genius has given us so much laughter and iconic music. What's your favourite Mel Brooks moment?

moments.title: Happy 48th to Nicole Scherzinger
moments.blurb: Singer, TV personality, and former Pussycat Dolls frontwoman Nicole Scherzinger celebrates her 48th birthday on Monday.

angles.name: Pussycat Doll Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 48th Birthday to the fabulous Nicole Scherzinger on Monday! What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls hit?

moments.title: Happy 78th to Deep Purple's Ian Paice
moments.blurb: Ian Paice, the legendary drummer and only constant member of Deep Purple, celebrates his 78th birthday on Monday.

angles.name: Rock Drummer Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to Deep Purple's drumming powerhouse, Ian Paice, this Monday! Still rocking after all these years!

moments.title: Happy 50th to 50 Cent
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper and entrepreneur 50 Cent (Curtis Jackson III) celebrates his 50th birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: Rap Legend Turns 50
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! 50 Cent turns 50 on July 6th! What's your favourite track from the rap icon?

moments.title: Happy 39th to Kate Nash
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Kate Nash, known for 'Foundations', celebrates her 39th birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: Indie Pop Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 39th Birthday to the wonderful British singer-songwriter Kate Nash on July 6th! Still love 'Foundations'!

moments.title: FIFA World Cup song 'Dai Dai' climbs charts
moments.blurb: Shakira and Burna Boy's official FIFA World Cup 2026 song, 'Dai Dai', has broken into the UK Top 20 at Number 19, outperforming previous World Cup anthems.

angles.name: World Cup Anthem
angles.copy: It's a goal! Shakira and Burna Boy's 'Dai Dai', the official FIFA World Cup 2026 song, is climbing the charts and is now in the UK Top 20! Are you feeling the World Cup fever?

angles.name: Global Hit
angles.copy: Shakira's done it again! The World Cup 2026 anthem 'Dai Dai' is a smash hit, now in the UK Top 20. Get ready to hear this all summer!

moments.title: Oasis' 'Wonderwall' back in Top 40 after World Cup singalong
moments.blurb: Oasis' iconic track 'Wonderwall' has re-entered the UK Top 40 at Number 33 after football players were heard singing it at a FIFA World Cup match.

angles.name: World Cup Singalong
angles.copy: Football brings people together! Oasis' 'Wonderwall' is back in the Top 40 after a World Cup singalong. Proof that some songs just never die!

angles.name: 90s Anthem
angles.copy: From the pitch to the charts! 'Wonderwall' by Oasis is making a comeback thanks to the World Cup. What a timeless anthem!
